deliverable: Constrained plan to immutable WorkflowSpec with typed ports and bounded condition/join/quorum/retry/approval primitives
release_gate: Invalid, cyclic, unbounded, over-budget, or conflicting write plans are rejected before execution

deliverable: Safe-step snapshots, leases, heartbeats, idempotency keys, child reattachment, orphan recovery
release_gate: At least 95% forced-failure recovery; zero duplicate non-idempotent side effects in the fault suite

deliverable: Separate trace replay, resume, fork, tool re-simulation, and clean-environment model rerun
release_gate: Each operation documents and tests which calls and side effects are reused versus re-executed

deliverable: Read/write sets, per-writer worktrees, conflict preflight, durable snapshots, explicit promotion
release_gate: No cross-worker writes outside assigned scope; conflicts produce a reviewable terminal state

deliverable: Approval tied to exact diff, command, environment, actor, policy, expiry, and proposal hash
release_gate: Mutation after approval invalidates the decision; proposer and approver separation supported
Operators can diagnose and recover reference workflow failures without inspecting raw database state
